findings: simulatedBatchMs() produces deterministic fake batch values — acceptable for mock phase; flag for replacement when real batch pipeline is wired.
Recharts Tooltip formatter typed as (value: number) which is narrower than Recharts default ValueType — works but may need widening if chart data types diversify.
